name: Center City Community
description_short: Center City Community Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Buena Park, California, offering auto loans, credit cards, personal loans, and deposit accounts.
description_long:
Center City Community Credit Union (CCCCU), also known as California Agribusiness Credit Union, operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution headquartered in Buena Park, California. The credit union positions itself as "The Trusted Financial Home for the Center of the Southland" and serves individuals who work and live in the Buena Park area.

CCCCU offers a full range of consumer financial products including auto loans (as low as 3.75% APR with terms up to 84 months), personal signature loans (as low as 5.50% APR), Visa credit cards (as low as 8.90% APR with rewards), and membership share accounts. The institution provides digital banking conveniences including online loan payments from external accounts, digital wallet functionality, and a debit rewards program. Members can access 24-hour account information and customer service support.

The credit union differentiates itself through its focus on community service in the Buena Park region, membership-based governance, and emphasis on fraud education and prevention. Their Visa credit card features bonus points redeemable for travel and gift rewards, and they offer balance transfer options. The institution operates physical branches and maintains an ATM network, with location services available via text or their website.

As a credit union, CCCCU is NCUA-insured and operates on a not-for-profit model prioritizing member benefits over shareholder returns. However, the website provides limited information about membership eligibility requirements beyond geographic and employment ties to Buena Park. Consumers should verify current membership qualifications and compare rates with other regional credit unions and banks before applying.
services: Auto loans (3.75% APR minimum, up to 84 months)
Visa credit cards with rewards points (8.90% APR minimum)
Balance transfer options on credit cards
Online loan payment system from external accounts
ATM network with branch locator services
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 3.75% APR with flexible terms up to 84 months
Visa credit card with rewards points redeemable for travel and gift rewards at 8.90% APR
NCUA-insured member accounts with not-for-profit structure prioritizing member benefits
24-hour account information and customer service telephone line (888-899-7225)
Digital banking options including secure online loan payments and digital wallet
Debit rewards program offering cash back or incentives on card usage
Multiple branch locations and ATM network with text-based ATM locator service
cons: Limited geographic reach—membership appears restricted to those working or living in Buena Park area
Website provides minimal details on membership eligibility criteria and application requirements
No information about savings account rates, money market accounts, or CD rates displayed
Limited online presence with no apparent mobile app mentioned on the website
No information about business lending or small business credit card products
best_for: Buena Park residents and workers seeking competitive auto loan rates
Consumers interested in rewards-bearing credit cards with travel redemption options
Individuals preferring member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions over banks
diagnosis: Center City Community Credit Union is best for Buena Park-area residents and workers seeking a community-focused credit union with competitive rates on auto loans and rewards credit cards. The main caveat is verifying membership eligibility, as the credit union appears to have geographic or employment restrictions, and prospective members should confirm they qualify before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Center City Community (Buena Park, CA) | CreditDoc
meta_description: Center City Community — NCUA-insured credit union in Buena Park, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
